backend.description: Search backend. 'duckduckgo' needs no setup. 'searxng' uses your own self-hosted instance (set searxng_url) and falls back to DuckDuckGo if it returns nothing.

searxng_url.description: Base URL of your SearXNG instance, e.g. https://searx.example.com. Only used when backend is 'searxng'. Must be a public http(s) host (private/loopback addresses are refused).

max_results.description: How many results to return per search (1–10).

fetch_pages.description: When researching a topic, also fetch and read the top result pages (richer, but slower and a larger attack surface). Fetches are SSRF-guarded and stripped to text; leave off unless you want the extra depth.
